why_them: WordPress site last meaningfully updated in 2021 with a dead Google+ link still present despite that platform shutting down in 2019. No client testimonials, no online appointment booking, and blog activity has been dormant for over five years. The firm specialises in rural property, forestry and renewable energy law — a strong local SEO opportunity entirely missed.
recommended_service: Website redesign + local SEO + content marketing
outreach_hook: Your Google+ link is still live — and Google+ shut down in 2019.

why_them: Running on a 2019 WordPress theme, the site is functional but lacks client testimonials, an active blog, and any form of online appointment booking. The estate agency side competes directly with more digitally aggressive local firms yet the property search is limited to basic dropdown filters. Established 1987, they have decades of credibility to leverage but no content strategy to do so.
recommended_service: Website refresh + SEO blog content + Google Reviews integration
outreach_hook: Braidwoods has no testimonials online — competitors are winning trust signals you're missing.

why_them: The WordPress site was last substantively updated in September 2020 with no blog, no testimonials, and no case studies — a significant gap for a firm competing on family law and personal injury where client trust is everything. Homepage copy is minimal with no differentiation beyond a tagline. The copyright metadata appears incorrectly dated, suggesting the theme is running on autopilot with no active maintenance.
recommended_service: Content marketing strategy + website refresh + testimonials integration
outreach_hook: Your website hasn't been updated since 2020 — new family law clients are likely choosing someone else.

why_them: One of Galloway's oldest legal practices established 1840, but the website is so slow it repeatedly times out for external visitors — a critical conversion killer. No general contact email is publicly listed, pushing all enquiries through phone only. The site appears to be a basic property-listing portal with no legal service content, no staff profiles, and no SEO strategy for the firm's breadth of practice areas.
recommended_service: Website redesign + performance optimisation + local SEO
outreach_hook: Your website times out before it loads — potential clients are bouncing before they ever reach you.

why_them: The news section has not been touched since September 2015 — over a decade of dead content sitting on a live page, actively signalling to Google that this site is stale. The site uses a deprecated Master Slider plugin with inline CSS bloat and no mobile-first optimisation. A firm spanning Newton Stewart, Stranraer and Girvan with a century-plus of combined history has zero online reviews, no testimonials, and no blog to capture local search traffic.
recommended_service: Full website redesign + SEO + content strategy
outreach_hook: Your news section hasn't been updated since 2015 — Google is treating your site as an abandoned property.

why_them: A 14-office group with 44 years of trading, but the WordPress site was last significantly updated in 2021 and has no active blog — the Insights menu item exists but leads nowhere. The design uses heavy inline CSS indicating technical debt across a large multi-branch property portal. Their Annan and Langholm offices serve D&G directly and would benefit from local landing pages and targeted SEO that the generic group site does not provide.
recommended_service: Local landing page SEO + content marketing + blog strategy
outreach_hook: Your 'Insights' section is live but empty — it's promising content you're not delivering.

why_them: Running on a theme literally named 'henderson-and-mackay-2014', last modified December 2020 with a copyright footer still showing 2019 — a website effectively abandoned for six years. No blog, no testimonials, and no online booking on a site competing against more digitally active regional firms. The estate agency arm lists on Zoopla and PrimeLocation but the home site cannot convert the traffic those portals generate.
recommended_service: Full website redesign + SEO + estate agency lead generation
outreach_hook: Your website theme is from 2014 and the copyright still says 2019 — it's costing you credibility with every visitor.

why_them: A Stranraer firm with over 100 years of history, yet the website uses a Facebook SDK from 2018 and has no blog, no testimonials, and only two active property listings visible. The estate agency side is particularly under-served digitally with minimal property content and no lead capture beyond a basic contact form. The century-plus heritage is mentioned nowhere prominently.
recommended_service: Website redesign + estate agency digital marketing + local SEO
outreach_hook: Over 100 years in business and your website shows just two properties — your online presence doesn't match your reputation.
